purpose: Schema for .itd-memory/GOAL.json — the persistent long-goal unit ledger written by /goal (v1.44.0). A goal is decomposed into an ORDERED list of verifiable units; each unit is driven one at a time (WIP=1) through the standard /task pipeline and flipped to 'verified' only with evidence. The file survives session death — a fresh session resumes from the first non-verified unit instead of re-deriving the plan. Validated by scripts/validate_state.py (dispatches on the GOAL.json filename). Goal units reference the same unit mechanics as STATE.json.currentUnit (v1.41.0): activating a goal unit opens it as the current unit and logs unit events to events.jsonl, so the VCR metric counts goal work automatically.
